question_title: Will the community prediction be higher than 13.00% on 2026-03-28 for the Metaculus question "Will the winner of the 2026 FIFA World Cup be a country that has never won before?"?
summary: This meta-prediction asks whether the Metaculus CP for "Will the 2026 FIFA World Cup winner be a new country?" will be strictly above 13.00% on March 28. The CP was exactly 13.00% as of March 14, right at the threshold. Historical weekly CP oscillated between 12-15% with a mean of ~13.8%, and 4 out of 6 weekly snapshots were above 13% (67% base rate). Mean-reversion modeling from the current below-average level suggests ~59% probability of being above threshold. Betting markets (~32%) and Manifold (17.3%) both suggest the underlying fundamentals are higher than the Metaculus CP, providing mild upward pressure. However, the most recent CP move was downward (15%→13%), the current CP is unknown (6 days since last snapshot), and the status quo at exactly 13.00% resolves NO. Balancing mean-reversion pull against recent decline and boundary effects, I estimate 55% probability of YES.

factors.description: Historical mean CP (~13.8%) is above the 13% threshold, suggesting mean-reversion pull upward from current below-average level
4 out of 6 weekly CP snapshots were strictly above 13% (empirical base rate 67%)
Betting markets imply ~32% for new winner, Manifold at 17.3% - fundamentals above CP suggest upward pressure
Most recent CP move was downward (15% to 13%), suggesting possible continuation of decline
CP is exactly at threshold (13.00%); status quo resolves NO. Need strictly above, boundary effect favors NO
Unknown current CP (6 days since last snapshot) adds uncertainty; could have drifted further down

reasoning:
**Forecast: 55% probability (YES)**

Key reasoning:
- The CP has historically oscillated between 12-15% with a mean of ~13.8%, slightly above the 13% threshold
- 4 out of 6 weekly observations were above 13% (67% base rate)
- Mean-reversion from the current below-average level provides a mild upward pull
- Betting markets (~32%) and Manifold (17.3%) both suggest fundamentals support a higher CP
- Counterbalanced by the recent downward trend (15%→13%), unknown current CP state, and the fact that status quo (exactly 13.00%) resolves NO

resolution_criteria: This question will resolve based on the community prediction of the Metaculus question found [here](https://www.metaculus.com/questions/41090) (i.e. the 'target question'). If the community prediction of the target question on 2026-03-28 05:35:32 is higher than 13.00%, this question will resolve to 'Yes'. If it is lower or equal to 13.00%, this question will resolve to 'No'. If the target question has already resolved before this question opens, then this question will be annulled. If the target question resolves after this question opens, but before 2026-03-28 05:35:32, then this question will resolve to the same value as the target question.
